concepts.headline: Anthropic opens its first Milan office.
concepts.subtext: Europe is Anthropic's fastest growing region, with revenue up 9x year over year.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout on a 1200x630px warm off-white (#faf9f6) canvas. Headline sits at 52px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.03em, anchored left with 72px left padding, positioned in the upper-center third of the canvas vertically. A 2px warm sand (#d7c8af) horizontal accent bar sits 20px above the headline, 120px wide, fading to transparent. Subtext sits 32px below the headline at 18px, weight 400, color #555, max-width 560px. A subtle DM Mono eyebrow label reads 'BREAKING NEWS' in 11px uppercase, letter-spacing 0.08em, color #888, positioned 18px above the accent bar. Flywheel wordmark sits bottom-left in 13px DM Mono uppercase, color #888. Right half of the canvas is reserved for a sparse particle dot network: 12 to 16 gray circles at 3-5px, opacity 0.08-0.12, connected by 0.5px hairline strokes, clustered loosely in the right 40% and slightly below center. 60%+ of the canvas is negative space.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline #111, subtext #555, eyebrow #888, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.08-0.12 opacity, brand mark #888.
concepts.reasoning: The headline_subtext_card is the right fit because the post is a focused announcement with a single key fact and one supporting proof point. The 9x revenue figure is the editorial anchor. Left-anchored hero layout with particle dots on the right embodies Flywheel's editorial restraint.

concepts.headline: Anthropic's European expansion, by the numbers.
concepts.subtext: Revenue up 9x year over year as Anthropic deepens its European presence.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored layout on a 1200x630px white (#ffffff) canvas with 64px padding on all sides. A 2px warm sand accent bar at the very top of the content area, 80px wide, flush left, fading right. Headline at 46px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.04em, color #111, anchored left, max-width 640px. Subtext at 17px, weight 400, color #555 sits 24px below the headline. Three stat tiles arranged in a horizontal row 40px below the subtext, each 200px wide with 24px gap between tiles. Each tile has a surface background (#f0efe9), 0px border-radius, 1px border #e5e5e5, and warm sand box-shadow. Inside each tile: the VALUE in DM Mono at 40px, weight 600, color #111; the LABEL in DM Mono at 12px uppercase, letter-spacing 0.07em, color #666, 8px below the value. Flywheel brand mark bottom-left at 12px DM Mono uppercase, #888. Right side of canvas above the stat row is largely empty, with a faint particle dot cluster at 0.07 opacity.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, headline #111, subtext #555, stat values #111, stat labels #666, tile surface #f0efe9, tile border #e5e5e5, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.07 opacity, shadow rgba(215,200,175,0.25).
concepts.reasoning: The multi_stat_panel works because the post contains three distinct, clean quantitative facts that together tell a story of scale. The DM Mono stat treatment adds editorial data-forward credibility aligned with Flywheel's design language.

concepts.headline: Europe: Anthropic's fastest growing region.
concepts.subtext: Revenue up 9x year over year. Offices now span London, Dublin, Zurich, Paris, Munich, and Milan.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero on a 1200x630px warm off-white (#faf9f6) canvas. A DM Mono eyebrow label 'ANTHROPIC / EUROPE' in 11px uppercase, letter-spacing 0.08em, color #888, sits at 72px from top, 72px from left. The hero stat '9x' renders at 120px, weight 700, DM Mono, color #111, letter-spacing -0.04em, 28px below the eyebrow. A descriptor line 'revenue growth year over year' in DM Mono 14px, color #555, sits 12px below the stat with a 2px warm sand left border accent 24px tall centered on the descriptor. The headline renders at 22px, weight 500, color #333, 36px below the descriptor, max-width 480px. Subtext at 16px, weight 400, color #666, 20px below headline, max-width 520px. Flywheel mark bottom-left, DM Mono 12px uppercase, #888. Right 40% of canvas: sparse particle dot network at 0.08-0.14 opacity, 14 dots, hairline connections.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, hero stat #111, eyebrow and descriptor #555-#888 range, accent border #d7c8af, subtext #666, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.08-0.14 opacity.
concepts.reasoning: The 9x revenue figure is the most powerful single data point in the post, making stat_callout the most editorial choice. It lets one number do all the work, which aligns perfectly with Flywheel's philosophy of communicating authority through removal rather than addition.

selection_reasoning: The stat_callout best embodies Flywheel's editorial restraint. A single hero number, '9x', carries the entire composition. No competing elements. The layout lets negative space and one bold figure speak for themselves, which is precisely how a premium tech publication would treat this story. The multi_stat_panel risks feeling too data-dense for a post that is fundamentally about one standout proof point.
